device_name: Aquilion Exceed LB (TSX-202A/3) V10.6 with AiCE-I
intended_use: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head. The Aquilion Exceed LB has the capability to provide volume sets. These volume sets can
intended_use_full: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head. The Aquilion Exceed LB has the capability to provide volume sets. These volume sets can be used to perform specialized studies, using indicated software/hardware, by a trained and qualified physician. AiCE (Advanced Intelligent Clear-IQ Engine) is a noise reduction algorithm that improves image quality and reduces image noise by employing Deep Convolutional Neural Network methods for abdomen, pelvis, lung, extremities, head and inner ear applications.
ground_truth: Phantoms (MITA-FDA LCD Body phantom); comparison to FBP (filtered backprojection) reconstruction and predicate device (Aquilion Prime SP)
other_metrics: Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR); CT Number Accuracy; Uniformity; Slice Sensitivity Profile (SSP); Modulation Transfer Function (MTF); Standard Deviation of Noise (SD); Noise Power Spectra (NPS); Dose reduction up to 82% for AiCE Abdomen relative to FBP; 63% improved low contrast detectability and 57.8% noise reduction with AIDR at same dose for body vs FBP; 87% improved low contrast detectability and 67.2% noise reduction with AiCE at same dose for body vs FBP; 22% improved low-contrast detectability and 27.5% dose reduction for Body CT with PUREViSION Optics; high contrast spatial resolution improvement with simultaneous 50% noise reduction with AiCE Body STD
